metadata.name: Information Requirement Hierarchy
metadata.description: Hierarchy of information requirements defined in ISO 19650 showing how organizational objectives translate into project information exchanges.
metadata.author: ISO19650 Knowledge Maps

nodes.label: Organization
nodes.description: Organization responsible for defining objectives and information requirements.

nodes.label: Organizational Information Requirements
nodes.description: Information required to support organizational objectives.

nodes.label: Asset Information Requirements
nodes.description: Information required to support asset management decisions.

nodes.label: Project Information Requirements
nodes.description: Information required to support project delivery decisions.

nodes.label: Exchange Information Requirements
nodes.description: Information required at defined information exchange points.

nodes.label: Information Production
nodes.description: Activity of producing information required for project delivery.

evidence.quote: Organizational objectives drive the identification of the information needed by the organization.
Organizational information requirements define the information needed to support organizational objectives.
Asset information requirements are derived from organizational information requirements.
Project information requirements define the information needed to support project delivery decisions.
Exchange information requirements specify the information required at exchange points.
Exchange information requirements define the information to be produced and delivered.
